title: Alpha Grass
description: Bring back the grass block of the earliest versions of Minecraft but adapted to new grass colors
body:
## Alpha Grass: Old grass texture but updated

**Alpha Grass** takes back the early grass texture (Alpha versions and Infdev), **but not as you expect**.  
The base is effectivly the alpha one, but it **adapts to new biomes** and looks so nice on modern versions.

### Comparison

#### 🌿 New Grass
![New Grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/994d3c1d1b2344a443468680b0deb9722be13c73.png)

#### 🌱 Alpha Grass
![Alpha Grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec605da45f0aa5d580da669b5e76c9d2749cb0bf.png)

In [gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/alpha-grasss/gallery) you can see a landscape example
